---
applyTo: "**"
---

- project uses uv, and the .venv is never active in the terminal
- always use pytest function names, not classes
- feel free to suggest better fastapi architectural patterns but ask first if you are unsure about the intent of the code
- use numpy style docstrings for all functions and methods, and markdown for swagger docstrings
- do not create unnecessary mock test cases, always prefer testing the actual code running with test data
